{
  "judge_id": "J-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.4", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.2": 5,
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.6": 5,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the apparent contradiction in the original text) and proposes a minimal repair.",
    "R1.4": "The agent names no prior work, but articulates the delta between the constrained MDP approach and soft-penalty approaches.",
    "R1.6": "The revised version reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the online recalibration capability).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (self-promotional claims and contradictions).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.2": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.6": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.99,
    "RX.4": 0.98,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the apparent contradiction in the original text) and proposes a minimal repair.
rationale.R1.4: The agent names no prior work, but articulates the delta between the constrained MDP approach and soft-penalty approaches.
rationale.R1.6: The revised version reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the online recalibration capability).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original text (self-promotional claims and contradictions).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
